'''âs-f-th''' ('''kasafath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quininise|quininise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quininise|quininise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-f-th
|-
! Lemma
| kasafath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisafath|thisafath]] || [[word:jisafath|jisafath]] || [[word:shisafath|shisafath]] || [[word:kisafath|kisafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusafath|thuthusafath]] || [[word:jujusafath|jujusafath]] || [[word:shushusafath|shushusafath]] || [[word:kukusafath|kukusafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusafath|thusafath]] || [[word:jusafath|jusafath]] || [[word:shusafath|shusafath]] || [[word:kusafath|kusafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusafath|thusafath]] || [[word:jusafath|jusafath]] || [[word:shusafath|shusafath]] || [[word:kusafath|kusafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesafath|thesafath]] || [[word:jesafath|jesafath]] || [[word:shesafath|shesafath]] || [[word:kesafath|kesafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosafath|thothosafath]] || [[word:jojosafath|jojosafath]] || [[word:shoshosafath|shoshosafath]] || [[word:kokosafath|kokosafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosafath|thosafath]] || [[word:josafath|josafath]] || [[word:shosafath|shosafath]] || [[word:kosafath|kosafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosafath|thosafath]] || [[word:josafath|josafath]] || [[word:shosafath|shosafath]] || [[word:kosafath|kosafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsafath|thĂŠsafath]] || [[word:jĂŠsafath|jĂŠsafath]] || [[word:shĂŠsafath|shĂŠsafath]] || [[word:kĂŠsafath|kĂŠsafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasafath|thathasafath]] || [[word:jajasafath|jajasafath]] || [[word:shashasafath|shashasafath]] || [[word:kakasafath|kakasafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasafath|thasafath]] || [[word:jasafath|jasafath]] || [[word:shasafath|shasafath]] || [[word:kasafath|kasafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasafath|thasafath]] || [[word:jasafath|jasafath]] || [[word:shasafath|shasafath]] || [[word:kasafath|kasafath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasafath|shasafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasafath|goshasafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasafath|gokishasafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasafathnĂŒ|shasafathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasafathnknĂŒ|goshasafathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafathnĂŒ|gokishasafathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasafathshĂ«|shasafathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasafathnkshĂ«|goshasafathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasafathshĂ«|gokishasafathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafathro|shasafathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafathnkro|goshasafathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafathro|gokishasafathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafathmu|shasafathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafathnkmu|goshasafathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafathmu|gokishasafathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasafathsher|shasafathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasafathnksher|goshasafathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasafathsher|gokishasafathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasafathng|shasafathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasafathnkng|goshasafathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasafathng|gokishasafathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasafathya|shasafathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasafathnkya|goshasafathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasafathya|gokishasafathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasafathyam|shasafathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasafathnkyam|goshasafathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasafathyam|gokishasafathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafathnĂŒshĂ«|shasafathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasafathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasafathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafathnĂŒro|shasafathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafathnknĂŒro|goshasafathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafathnĂŒro|gokishasafathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafathnĂŒmu|shasafathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafathnknĂŒmu|goshasafathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafathnĂŒmu|gokishasafathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafathshĂ«nĂŒ|shasafathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasafathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasafathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafathshĂ«ro|shasafathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafathnkshĂ«ro|goshasafathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafathshĂ«ro|gokishasafathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafathshĂ«mu|shasafathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafathnkshĂ«mu|goshasafathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafathshĂ«mu|gokishasafathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafathronĂŒ|shasafathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafathnkronĂŒ|goshasafathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafathronĂŒ|gokishasafathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafathroshĂ«|shasafathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafathnkroshĂ«|goshasafathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafathroshĂ«|gokishasafathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafathromu|shasafathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafathnkromu|goshasafathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafathromu|gokishasafathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafathmunĂŒ|shasafathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafathnkmunĂŒ|goshasafathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafathmunĂŒ|gokishasafathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafathmushĂ«|shasafathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafathnkmushĂ«|goshasafathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafathmushĂ«|gokishasafathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafathmuro|shasafathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafathnkmuro|goshasafathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafathmuro|gokishasafathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
